scenes.voice: Hey kids! Let's explore the amazing human body! Today, we're going to learn about our five senses.

scenes.subtext: Our eyes help us see the world around us.
scenes.voice: Our eyes are a special part of our body that helps us see things. We use our eyes to watch our favorite TV shows, read books, and even see our friends and family.

scenes.subtext: Our ears help us hear different sounds.
scenes.voice: Our ears are another important part of our body that helps us hear sounds. We use our ears to listen to our favorite music, hear the birds chirping, and even understand what our friends are saying.

scenes.subtext: Our nose helps us smell different smells.
scenes.voice: Our nose is a special part of our body that helps us smell things. We use our nose to smell delicious food, fresh flowers, and even the ocean.

scenes.subtext: Our tongue helps us taste different foods.
scenes.voice: Our tongue is another important part of our body that helps us taste food. We use our tongue to taste sweet, salty, sour, and even bitter foods.
Think you know the answer? Our ears help us hear sounds! What else can we use to hear sounds?

That's it for today's lesson! We learned that our eyes help us see, our ears help us hear, and our nose, tongue, and skin all help us in different ways. Great job, kids! Keep exploring and learning about the amazing human body!
